features.name: five_stage_register_chain_pipeline
features.description: Code should include a chain of five registers connected in series where each register captures the output of the previous register on the positive clock edge

features.name: reset_initialized_shift_register
features.description: Code should include a shift register chain where all registers are initialized to zero upon reset and shift data on each clock cycle when not in reset

features.name: equiv_induct_deep_pipeline
features.description: Code should include a deep pipeline design with five or more sequential stages using non-blocking assignments to shift data through a register chain
